items.title: investingLive Asia-Pacific market moving news: 24 July 2026: Asian equities slapped down
items.summary: ICYMI - Iran rejects Trump ceasefire offer carried by Iraqi PM, NYT reports Gold extends slide below $4,040 support to test $4,025 as yields bite Asian shares slump as AI spending fears and oil spike hit sentiment, rates Preview - BOJ to hold next week, keep inflation overshoot warning.
items.summaryZh: ICYMI -伊朗拒绝伊拉克总理提出的特朗普停火提议，纽约时报报道称，金价将下跌至4,040 $以下，以测试4,025 $ ，因为随着人工智能支出担忧和石油飙升打击情绪，收益率咬了亚洲股票，利率预览-日本央行将于下周举行，保持通胀超调警告。
items.summaryEn: ICYMI - Iran rejects Trump ceasefire offer carried by Iraqi PM, NYT reports Gold extends slide below $4,040 support to test $4,025 as yields bite Asian shares slump as AI spending fears and oil spike hit sentiment, rates Preview - BOJ to hold next week, keep inflation overshoot warning.

items.title: investingLive Americas FX news wrap 23 Jul: Risk off sentiment as geopolitical tensions rise.
items.summary: It was an ugly day for US stocks. Carney: Canada Focused on a Comprehensive USMCA Deal Crude oil futures settled at $92.19 up $5.36 or 6.17% AMD and Cerbras form a partnership that makes chips faster and more efficient. EU Google Fine Escalates U.S.-EU Trade Tensions US Senate blocks resolution curbing Trump's Iran War Powers. Tensions remain high.
items.summaryZh: 这对美国股市来说是一个丑陋的日子。Carney ： Canada Focused on a Comprehensive USMCA Deal原油期货结算价为$ 92.19 ，上涨$ 5.36或6.17% ， AMD和Cerbras形成合作伙伴关系，使芯片更快、更高效。欧盟谷歌罚款升级美欧贸易紧张局势美国参议院阻止遏制特朗普伊朗战争权力的决议。紧张局势依然高涨。
items.summaryEn: It was an ugly day for US stocks. Carney: Canada Focused on a Comprehensive USMCA Deal Crude oil futures settled at $92.19 up $5.36 or 6.17% AMD and Cerbras form a partnership that makes chips faster and more efficient. EU Google Fine Escalates U.S.-EU Trade Tensions US Senate blocks resolution curbing Trump's Iran War Powers. Tensions remain high.

items.title: The full statement from the ECB as they keep rates unchanged.
items.summary: 23 July 2026 The Governing Council today decided to keep the three key ECB interest rates unchanged. The outlook for energy prices, while highly volatile, currently stands close to the baseline of the June Eurosystem staff projections and well above the levels recorded prior to the conflict in the Middle East.
items.impactZh: 央行政策预期变化可能提升主要货币对波动，杠杆仓位的保证金与回撤压力上升。
items.impactEn: Shifts in central-bank expectations may increase major-pair volatility and raise margin/drawdown pressure on leveraged positions.
items.summaryZh: 2026年7月23日，理事会今天决定保持欧洲央行三大关键利率不变。能源价格前景虽然波动很大，但目前接近6月份欧元系统员工预测的基线，远高于中东冲突前记录的水平。
items.summaryEn: 23 July 2026 The Governing Council today decided to keep the three key ECB interest rates unchanged. The outlook for energy prices, while highly volatile, currently stands close to the baseline of the June Eurosystem staff projections and well above the levels recorded prior to the conflict in the Middle East.
